nasb.text: Then all the tribes of Israel came to David at Hebron and said, “Behold, we are your bone and your flesh.

esv.text: Then all the tribes of Israel came to David at Hebron and said, “Behold, we are your bone and flesh.

cnv.text: 以色列眾支派都到希伯崙來見大衛，說：“看哪！我們都是你的骨肉至親。

ccb.text: 以色列各支派都来希伯仑见大卫，对他说：“我们是你的骨肉同胞。
